utterances.speaker: Russell
utterances.text: You got married again .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Yes .

utterances.speaker: Russell
utterances.text: So that is your second marriage in two years .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Yes , second in two years . Third overall .

utterances.speaker: Russell
utterances.text: Ross , I have been a divorce attorney for 23 years and never had I so much business from one client .

utterances.speaker: Russell
utterances.text: Why do not you tell me what happened .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Basically , Rachel and I were in Vegas and we got drunk

utterances.speaker: Russell
utterances.text: I am sorry , is this the same Rachel who name you said at the altar in the second marriage ?

emotion_cause.span: 8_is this the same Rachel who name you said at the altar in the second marriage ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Yes ... yes ... yes ! But , I ... I do

utterances.speaker: Russell
utterances.text: Oh , that is better then .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: This was just a drunken mistake and I need to get it annulled .

emotion_cause.span: 11_This was just a drunken mistake and I need to get it annulled .

utterances.speaker: Russell
utterances.text: I see . Have you considered therapy ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: I think just the annulment for today .

utterances.speaker: Russell
utterances.text: There are a couple of forms to fill out .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Easy .

utterances.speaker: Russell
utterances.text: And we will need to have witnesses who can testify that you were not of uh , sound mind .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: No problem .

utterances.speaker: Russell
utterances.text: And we will need you and Rachel to testify before a judge .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Ooh !

emotion_cause.span: 18_And we will need you and Rachel to testify before a judge .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: There is no way to do this without her ?

emotion_cause.span: 21_Cause I kinda all ready told her uh , it was , it was already taken care of .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Cause I kinda all ready told her uh , it was , it was already taken care of .

emotion_cause.span: 21_Cause I kinda all ready told her uh , it was , it was already taken care of .
